zh.lifeSummary: 當Alfonso Tellez de Meneses IV Señor de Meneses於大約1203年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安瓦拉阿多利德蒙特亞利格 德 甘波斯蒙特亞利格時，他的父親Alfonso Téllez de Meneses44歲，母親Teresa Girón y Núñez de Lara29歲。他和María Yáñez de Lima y Ribeira至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於大約1257年在他的家鄉享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alfonso Tellez de Meneses IV Señor de Meneses于大约1203年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安瓦拉阿多利德蒙特亞利格 德 甘波斯蒙特亞利格时，他的父亲Alfonso Téllez de Meneses44岁，母亲Teresa Girón y Núñez de Lara29岁。他和María Yáñez de Lima y Ribeira至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于大约1257年在他的家乡享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Tellez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Ramon, Manuel, Ruben, Carlos, Jesus, Luis, Javier, Roberto, Jorge, Mario.
Spanish (Téllez): patronymic from the medieval personal name Tello .

variants.name: Tello
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Jorge, Fernando, Pedro, Francisco, Arturo, Miguel, Carlos, Manuel, Pablo.
Spanish: from the medieval personal name Tello, Latinized as Tellus, probably of ancient Germanic origin.
Italian: from a short form of a personal name formed with this suffix, as for example Donatello, Muscatello , Otello.

variants.name: Telles
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Luis, Adolpho, Alfonso, Armando, Francisco, Jorge, Pablo, Ramon, Ruben, Alberto.
Portuguese: patronymic from the medieval personal name Tellus, probably of ancient Germanic origin.
Spanish: variant of   Tellez  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Meneses
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Luis, Manuel, Jorge, Francisco, Mario, Juan, Orlando, Alejandro, Arturo, Benigno.  Portuguese Joao, Mateus, Henrique, Joaquim, Ligia.
Spanish and Portuguese: habitational name from either of two places called Meneses de Campos in Palencia and Castile, Spain.

variants.name: Menezes
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Luiz, Marcos, Sergio, Alberto, Antero, Eduardo, Adelino, Alda, Ana, Ana Maria.  Portuguese Ademir, Almir, Guilherme, Marcio, Paulo.  Indian Geetha, Jeevan, Naresh, Rahul, Rohit, Shalini, Vinod, Vivek.
Portuguese and Spanish: variant of   Meneses  . This surname is also found in western India and in East Timor, to which it was brought by Portuguese colonists in the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Alfonso
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Visigothic: probably a compound of adal ‘noble’ + funs ‘ready’; a traditional royal name.

en.lifeSummary: When Alfonso Tellez de Meneses IV Señor de Meneses was born about 1203, in Montealegre, Montealegre de Campos, Valladolid, Castilla y León, Spain, his father, Alfonso Téllez de Meneses, was 44 and his mother, Teresa Girón y Núñez de Lara, was 29. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with María Yáñez de Lima y Ribeira. He died about 1257, in his hometown, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alfonso Tellez de Meneses IV Señor de Meneses est né environ 1203, à Montealegre, Montealegre de Campos, Valladolid, Castilla y León, Espagne, son père, Alfonso Téllez de Meneses, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Teresa Girón y Núñez de Lara, avait 29 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec María Yáñez de Lima y Ribeira. Il est décédé environ 1257, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alfonso Tellez de Meneses IV Señor de Meneses um 1203 in Montealegre, Montealegre de Campos, Valladolid, Castilla y León, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alfonso Téllez de Meneses 44 und seine Mutter Teresa Girón y Núñez de Lara 29. Er hatte mit María Yáñez de Lima y Ribeira mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1257 im Alter von 56 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alfonso Tellez de Meneses IV Señor de Meneses è nato il circa 1203 nel Montealegre, Montealegre de Campos, Valladolid, Castilla y León, Spagna, il suo padre, Alfonso Téllez de Meneses, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Teresa Girón y Núñez de Lara, aveva 29 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con María Yáñez de Lima y Ribeira. Morì circa 1257, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alfonso Tellez de Meneses IV Señor de Menesesが約1203年にスペインカスティラ イ レoンヴァラドリドモンテアレグア ド カンプオスモンテアレグアで生まれた時，父Alfonso Téllez de Menesesは44歳，母Teresa Girón y Núñez de Laraは29歳であった。彼はMaría Yáñez de Lima y Ribeiraとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1257年に故郷で56歳で死去した。

ko.Montealegre,Valladolid,Espanha: 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 발라도리드 몽올그르 데 캄푸스 몽올그르
ko.lifeSummary: Alfonso Tellez de Meneses IV Señor de Meneses(이)가 대략 1203년 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 발라도리드 몽올그르 데 캄푸스 몽올그르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alfonso Téllez de Meneses(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Teresa Girón y Núñez de Lara(은)는 29세였다. 그는 María Yáñez de Lima y Ribeira(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1257년 그의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alfonso Tellez de Meneses IV Señor de Meneses nasceu aproximadamente 1203, em Montealegre, Montealegre de Campos, Valladolid, Castilla y León, Espanha, seu pai, Alfonso Téllez de Meneses, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Teresa Girón y Núñez de Lara, tinha 29 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com María Yáñez de Lima y Ribeira. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1257, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alfonso Tellez de Meneses IV Señor de Meneses родился около 1203 г. в местности монтилегр, монтилегр де кампос, валладолид, кастилла и леoн, Испания, его отцу по имени Alfonso Téllez de Meneses было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Teresa Girón y Núñez de Lara, 29. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от María Yáñez de Lima y Ribeira. Он умер около 1257 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alfonso Tellez de Meneses IV Señor de Meneses nació aproximadamente 1203, en Montealegre, Montealegre de Campos, Valladolid, Castilla y León, España, su papá, Alfonso Téllez de Meneses, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Teresa Girón y Núñez de Lara, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con María Yáñez de Lima y Ribeira. Murió aproximadamente 1257, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años.
